summary: Completed the r03 branch closeout wake. Built and verified a LaTeX/PDF decision report, updated work/state.md and work notes, recorded report evidence and a lab-log entry, and marked the project lifecycle completed. Final scoped conclusion: image145844_reimage_r03 is the aligned NV candidate; no claim-grade numeric T2star can be quoted from the completed Ramsey branch; no supported nearby-13C Ramsey sideband/coupling evidence is resolved under current conditions. No further automatic bridge-touching work is justified without a new explicit protocol-development request.

next_action.reason: Project lifecycle is completed after closeout report; no further automatic work remains. If operator wants a numeric T2star despite this closeout, start a new protocol-development branch rather than repeating long-span Ramsey.
